chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 2509 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge Priority: 1. For hearing of CMA No.11318/2020 (Stay): 2. For hearing of Main Case: 20.05.2020: Mr. Mohamed Vawda, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Salman Talibuddin, Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Ghulam Shabbir Shah, Addl. Advocate General Sindh. ---------- Mr. Mohamed Vawda advocate requests for adjournment on the ground that Mr. Faisal Siddiqui advocate is busy before the Hon’ble Supreme Court. He is put on notice to satisfy the Court on the next date regarding maintainability of this petition as we are of the tentative view that prayer clause (a) is premature as the subject rules have not yet been declared as ultra vires and are admittedly in the field; and, prayer clause (b) has become infructuous as clauses (ii) and (iv) mentioned therein have already been superseded by The Sindh COVID-19 Emergency Relief Ordinance, 2020. By consent, adjourned to a date in office. J U D G E J U D G E
